title: Ultimate Pronunciation Review
learningGoal: Review and master the most difficult English pronunciation sounds, including L vs R, V vs B, TH, and word stress.
instructions: これまでの3ヶ月で学んだ「日本人が特に苦手とする発音」の総復習です。LとRの違い、VとBの違い、THの音、そして長い単語のアクセント（強勢）に注意して、自信を持って発音してください。(Review the most difficult English pronunciation sounds from the past 3 months.)

targetPhrasesOrWords.phoneticHint: R sound: Round your lips like you are going to say 'W'. rrr-ight.
L sound: Touch the tip of your tongue to the roof of your mouth just behind your teeth.
V sound: Lightly bite your bottom lip and blow air out.
B sound: Close your lips completely, then pop them open.
TH sound: Put your tongue between your teeth and blow air out. Do not make an 'S' sound.
Voiced TH sound: Put your tongue between your teeth and make a buzzing sound.
Linking: Link the 'd' and 'y' to make a 'j' sound. Coo-joo.

targetPhrasesOrWords.transliteration: アイド ライク トゥ
targetPhrasesOrWords.phoneticHint: Linking: Don't pronounce the 'd' too strongly. I-dlike-tuh.
Word Stress: Stress the second syllable. a-POL-o-gize.
Word Stress: Stress the first syllable. CUMF-ter-bul.
Word Stress: Stress the first syllable. VEJ-tuh-bul.
Word Stress: Stress the second syllable. ih-MUR-jen-see.

expectedPronunciationText: right light very berry think that Could you I'd like to apologize comfortable vegetable emergency

feedbackRules.onPass: Perfect! You have mastered the most difficult English sounds. Your R/L and V/B distinctions are great.
feedbackRules.onFail: Please try again. Pay close attention to your mouth and tongue position for L vs R, and V vs B.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort. Keep practicing the TH sound (think, that). Remember to put your tongue between your teeth.

adminCorrectAnswerSet.exactCorrectTranscript: right light very berry think that Could you I'd like to apologize comfortable vegetable emergency
acceptedVariants: right light very berry think that could you i'd like to apologize comfortable vegetable emergency
adminCorrectAnswerSet.nativeScriptReference: right light very berry think that Could you I'd like to apologize comfortable vegetable emergency
adminCorrectAnswerSet.transliteration: rite lite veree beree think that coojoo iydliketuh ahpahlohgyze cumfterbul vejtuhbul ihmurjensee

audioAssets.audioTranscript: right, light, very, berry, think, that, Could you, I'd like to, apologize, comfortable, vegetable, emergency

hintText: To make the 'V' sound in 'very' and 'vegetable', you must touch your top teeth to your bottom lip.
commonMistakes: Confusing R and L (saying light instead of right).
Not using the teeth for the TH sound.
